positive: Minimalist abstract mountain range silhouette at sunset, forming a majestic crescent shape against a gradient of deep indigo, vibrant orange, and soft peach. The mountain peaks should be sharply defined, suitable for screen printing on a dark background. Include stylized, single-line art elements like stylized constellations and abstract floating geometric shapes to enhance depth. Clean lines, high contrast, limited color palette, perfect for apparel prints. Vector art style, clean silhouette, central composition, dramatic lighting, graphic design.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, complex background, realistic photo, signature
